name: voxora-platform
description: Plataforma Voxora de transcricao (web + api + worker).

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @voxora/shared && npm-run-all --parallel dev:redis dev:web dev:api dev:worker
scripts.smoke: npm run smoke:artifacts && npm run smoke:contracts
scripts.test:unit: node scripts/tests/test-financial-calc.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-job-states.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-idempotency-keys.mjs && node scripts/tests/test-hold-capture-refund.mjs
scripts.gate:pr: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run smoke
